element_introduction_order.mastery_context: standard offensive capability, varies by chosen craft
requires positional prediction to place shield in projectile path
visual clutter; collision with edges/walls causes death but direct contact with scenery is safe
extended survival resource scattered through stages
extremely fast pacing compared to genre peers; demands rapid reaction

typical_tension_triggers: dense projectile patterns requiring Power Star positioning
narrow environmental passages combined with enemy fire
screen-edge crushing risk during fast scroll
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: extremely fast scrolling and enemy movement creates sustained high-intensity pressure; relief gaps sparse and brief

difficulty_curve.early_game: Levels 1-2 introduce core mechanics at high speed; survivability tests basic 8-directional movement and Power Star blocking
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Levels 3-5 escalate enemy density and projectile complexity; craft-specific weapon strengths become tactical factors
difficulty_curve.late_game: Levels 6-8 unlock only on higher difficulties; final stages combine maximum speed with dense hazard patterns
notable_spikes: Level 1 opening: fast scroll speed establishes genre-high baseline difficulty immediately
Final three levels: difficulty gates restrict access to hardest content by selected difficulty setting

notable_level_patterns.pattern_name: High-speed horizontal scroll with dense enemy waves
notable_level_patterns.description: All eight levels follow horizontally scrolling paradigm with enemy spawning timed to screen velocity; projectile density increases per level
Decorative environmental elements in multiple depth planes create visual texture without collision risk, reducing cognitive load from pure hazard parsing
Four biowarriors with variant speeds and weapons create four distinct difficulty curves; slower craft offset by different weapon spreads
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Persistent across all levels based on character choice
